name: capnprotols-vscode
description: Language server support for Cap'n Proto schema files (capnprotols).

capnprotols.serverPath.description: Path to the capnprotols binary. Defaults to looking on $PATH.

capnprotols.compilerPath.description: Path to the capnp binary used by the language server.

capnprotols.importPaths.description: Extra -I import paths passed to capnp compile.

capnprotols.format.enabled.description: Master switch for textDocument/formatting. When false, format requests return no edits.

capnprotols.format.maxWidth.description: Hard column limit. Long code lines are wrapped (or, if no wrapper applies, flagged with a warning diagnostic).

capnprotols.format.warnLongLines.description: Publish a WARNING diagnostic when a line exceeds maxWidth and the formatter can't auto-wrap it.

capnprotols.trace.server.description: Trace LSP traffic to the Output panel.
